founder: 克里斯托瓦尔·巴伦西亚加
description_zh: 巴黎世家（Balenciaga）是创立于西班牙后迁至法国的顶级时装品牌，1917年由被誉为「大师中的大师」的克里斯托瓦尔·巴伦西亚加在圣塞巴斯蒂安创立，1937年迁至巴黎。巴伦西亚加先生以其建筑感的结构主义剪裁和高定技艺闻名——他的茧形大衣、气球裙和娃娃裙设计至今影响深远，连克里斯汀·迪奥都尊称他为「我们所有人的大师」。2015年，格鲁吉亚设计师德姆娜·格瓦萨利亚出任创意总监，将品牌彻底重塑为街头风格与奢侈时尚碰撞的前卫代表。Triple S老爹鞋、Tracker运动鞋和Hourglass沙漏包等单品引爆全球潮流。巴黎世家以反传统、解构主义和「丑美学」著称，将高定基因与青年亚文化融合，成为当今最具话题性和影响力的奢侈品牌之一，隶属开云集团。

languages.en: Balenciaga is a premier fashion house founded in 1917 by Cristóbal Balenciaga in San Sebastián, Spain, later moving to Paris in 1937. Known as 'the master of us all' by Christian Dior, Balenciaga pioneered architectural silhouettes and structural tailoring — his cocoon coats, balloon skirts, and sack dresses remain profoundly influential. In 2015, Georgian designer Demna Gvasalia took over as creative director, radically reinventing the brand as an avant-garde fusion of streetwear and luxury. Pieces like the Triple S sneakers, Track trainers, and the Hourglass bag became global sensations. Known for anti-traditionalism, deconstruction, and 'ugly aesthetics,' Balenciaga merges haute couture heritage with youth subculture, becoming one of the most talked-about and influential luxury brands today, owned by Kering.
